Character Pages
[
]

The character pages shall follow the next order:

Brief Intro Paragraph
[
]

Refers to the introduction of the character. It goes without a Heading.

Appearance
[
]

The 
appearance
 of a character.

Personality
[
]

The character's 
personality
.

Background
[
]

The 
background
 of the character. Use this field for any information about the character that has happened before the character was introduced.

Plotline / History
[
]

The 
history
 of a character. Start this field off with when the character first appeared and what happens in the story.

Trivia
[
]

Add any 
trivia
 about a character. If there is no trivia leave this field empty.

References
[
]

Links can change in the future, use the template {{R|(Chapter Number)}} since it can be easily changed that way. Put 
{{References}} at the bottom of each page.

Wikia
[
]

Stub
[
]

Stub
 refers to articles that are in need of more information. If the article is a stub then add the 
Category:Stub

Tabs
[
]

Tabs
 refers to tabs that link to sub-pages of a main article. If you have no uses for them then leave them blank.

tab1 - Must always be named 
Overview

Categories
[
]

All pages and images must be categorised to provide an organised structure that enables future readers and contributors to find other pages. Categories should be added to the end of each page.

Sub-pages
 should only have Main-pages' name.

Images
[
]

Files should be named properly so that they are easily searchable.

All Images should be from official sources.

Since the Novel has a Manhua we prefer to illustrations from there.

Vandalism
[
]

Vandalism is not tolerated under any circumstances.

Users have put in their effort into building up pages, so try to not mess things up.

If you are found to be vandalising pages, you will be blocked from editing for a certain amount of time.

If you are a frequent offender, the time you are blocked can be increased.

These policies are inspired by the 
Against the Gods
 wiki policies
